node.text: Ask us what the greatest thing about November 10th, 2020 is. 🎮 🌫
It's funny because it's true.
We made this PowerPoint presentation to prove why you should dress up as "Bliss," the Windows XP default wallpaper, for Halloween. 🎃 Any questions?

For thousands of years, Samish people have gathered in cedar longhouses along the saltwater shores of the Pacific Northwest. With the pandemic forcing social distancing, the Samish Indian Nation can now only convene in one location to sing tribal songs and share other ancestral traditions – Microsoft Teams. Watch our Story for more.

As human civilization has expanded, we’ve reached the point globally where humanity depletes the available freshwater supply at a rate of 4.3 trillion cubic meters every year. 🤯💔 This needs to change. Check out our Story for more on our commitment to be water positive for our direct operations by 2030.
Go ahead and save it one more time.

To celebrate LGBTQI+ History month, we're giving away these @Xbox One X custom #Pride consoles on Twitter. Oh, and while you’re here: stand up against racism, ableism, prejudice, and fear. Embrace uncomfortable conversations and educate yourself on inclusion and equity. 🎮🌈

Designed by Microsoft employees Angela, Ethan, and Aaron.
Same generation, same power, same feel. But the difference is night and day. #XboxSeriesX #XboxSeriesS

Seagulls, algae, barnacles, and sea anemones from the seafloor of Scotland’s Orkney Islands. Not exactly what you'd expect from us, huh? 

Earlier this summer, marine specialists reeled up a shipping container-sized datacenter: Microsoft's Project Natick. The retrieval launched the final phase of a years-long effort that proved that underwater datacenters are feasible as well as logistically, environmentally, and economically practical.

Swipe ➡ to see Project Natick get a power wash bath. 🧽

node.text: The more you know. 🌱♻️🔋💚
Mentally, we're here.
We still have 3 minutes and 27 seconds of free time before the meeting starts, Kevin.
The sky is calling. From light planes to wide-body jets, fly detailed and accurate aircraft in the next generation of #MicrosoftFlightSimulator. Check out our Story for more.
Ten precious minutes.

Swipe for a surprise, and check out our Story for more. 👀
.
.
Available for preorder in the US starting today, Surface Duo brings together the power of Microsoft 365 experiences and the full ecosystem of Android mobile apps into one device, with two screens that you can take anywhere. #DoOneBetter

Lasso. Armor. Wonder Woman. 

Be the hero on your next #MicrosoftTeams call with these #WW84 backgrounds. Check out our Story for more.

Yes, Carmilla, we can see you now.
.
#InternationalCatDay
Choose your fighter 🎮
Not sure who needs this today, but …

🎾 Good 🎾 News 🎾
Today, we’re announcing a multi-year partnership with rising star @CocoGauff. Using Microsoft technology, this game-changer will prepare for the biggest challenge of her career: a tennis grand slam. Check out our Story for more.
Skyscrapers shine, Marina Bay glistens, the “flyer” … flies. 🏙 Located in the Central Business District of one of the world’s greenest cities, can anyone guess where this Microsoft campus is located?
Shall we do intros while we wait?

Welcome back, Chief. 🎮
.
.
#HaloInfinite #XboxGameShowcase

node.text: Internal thoughts. 💭

.

.
Many of us are still working from home, so we asked our coworkers to share pictures of their pets! The companions who keep us company and make the best guest appearances during our Microsoft Teams meetings. 🐶🐱🐰

Today, we're sharing the additional steps we'll take to address racial injustice—and to create lasting change in our company, our industry, and beyond. Click the link in our bio to read more.

node.text: Elephant Mountain by day, Shilin market by night. Whether you're hiking or enjoying the expansive street-vendor food scene, this modern metropolis is home to another beautiful Microsoft campus. Any ideas where it's located?
Starting in 10 minutes: CEO Satya Nadella takes the virtual stage at our all-digital #MSBuild, live on Twitter. Check out our Story for more.
Red Rocks, Buffalo Bill, Dinosaur Ridge. Ring any bells? With quick and easy access to the Rocky Mountains, adventure is a day’s trip away from this Microsoft campus. Any idea where it’s located?
This is the content we all deserve. With many of us #WorkingFromHome, we asked coworkers to send pictures of the #PetFriends they're sharing their offices with. Leroy stole the show.

832 windows, six floors, and another glimpse into a beautiful Microsoft campus. Can you guess where it’s located? Clue: Known as the center of fashion and football, this city is also rich with Roman and Spanish heritage. Looking for one of the best spots to catch a sunset? Head to Navigli. 🍝 🏉 🌅

node.text: The world may have changed, but our customers keep going. #NothingCanStopATeam

With the help of volunteers, Microsoft has assembled more than 120,000 boxed lunches for local families in need. #COVID19🥪 “Every day, people are making a lot of sacrifices, with kids at home and other struggles. If I’m going to be a leader for this program, I want to be there for my people.” - Kris Valencia, director of catering services.

node.text: Custom backgrounds from #MicrosoftTeams have officially started rolling out. 👀❄️🌸🌲

#StayingHome and showcasing another Microsoft campus. Can you guess where it’s located?

Clue: the terrain here spans farmlands, mountains and coastal beaches. When you’re sitting under a big, beautiful Quercus virginiana, you’ve probably got a peach in your hand.
On this day in 1975, Microsoft was born. 🧁🎉

Because so many of us are #StayingHome, we're keen to show you one of our campuses – but where is it? Clue: If you're ever in town, maybe you''ll make a visit to The Rocks and enjoy a cuppa by the harbour.

If dogs could use #MicrosoftTeams ⬇️
.
Kit: Okay, I'm calling this meeting of the Good Doggo Society to order.
Cooper: Who's talking? How do I work this thing?
Elliot: [rolls eyes] Three years old and still can't figure out Teams.
Daq: ...................
Kit: Let's focus, I've got a hard stop at 3.
Daq: .................
Elliot: Is 'what's for dinner' on the agenda?
Kit: Is no one prepared for this meeting? Daq??
Daq: Sorry, I was on mute.
Kit: WOOF
This #InternationalDayOfForests, we appreciate how forests calm, connect, and teach us. Our partner, SilviaTerra, is helping change the way we preserve the trees we all rely on.
Sláinte to a much-needed sense of community. 🍀 Today, we’re celebrating our Irish colleagues—and all our employees around the world—with a warm [virtual] hug.

This #InternationalWomensDay, we’re celebrating the trailblazers who inspire all of us to break down the barriers that get in the way. We stand behind all girls and women who rise above the voices saying, “you can’t.” Because we, and millions of others, know you can.

Link in bio for more on Jessica, Halee, Grace, Anna, and Emily. #IWD2020 #IWD #WomensHistoryMonth #WomenInSTEM

Tap the ❤️ if you've ever used #MicrosoftWord.

node.text: Quantum computing may seem like the next frontier, but its foundations have actually been around for billions of years—in the natural world. In our new series, Quantum Impact, learn how we're tapping into Earth's natural systems to unlock solutions that'll help secure our planet's future. 🌱
